name: Seabird Exploration PLC Namens-
summary: SeaBird Exploration PLC is a marine seismic company providing 2D, 3D, and 4D seismic data services to the oil and gas industry. The company operates a fleet of seismic vessels and offers a range of services, including data acquisition, processing, and interpretation, and is headquartered in Cyprus. SeaBird Exploration focuses on providing high-quality seismic data to help oil and gas companies explore for and develop hydrocarbon resources.
